title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at NIIT Technologies

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at NIIT Technologies
jsonLd.description:
NIIT Technologies, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Frontend Developer for our Navi Mumbai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About NIIT Technologies:
NIIT Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIIT Technologies!
